buggy_variants.description: Uses exclusive lower bound, dropping events exactly on the cutoff timestamp.
Rejects equal timestamps on add, though non-decreasing timestamps should be valid.
Allows querying past timestamps instead of raising, mutating state unexpectedly.
total(None) returns sum of all stored events without expiring by latest timestamp.
Expires before adding a new event, so a just-added old event can survive one step too long.
Accepts zero window size, leading to inconsistent empty-window behavior.
Future total(ts) changes latest_ts, affecting later order checks and results.
